| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleCurve.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleCurve.type) |  |
| [use_all_curves](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleCurve.use_all_curves) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [boolean](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleCurve.boolean) | Create Sample Curve with operation 'Boolean'. |
| [color](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleCurve.color) | Create Sample Curve with operation 'Color'. |
| [float](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleCurve.float) | Create Sample Curve with operation 'Float'. |
| [integer](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleCurve.integer) | Create Sample Curve with operation 'Integer'. |
| [matrix](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleCurve.matrix) | Create Sample Curve with operation '4x4 Matrix'. |
| [quaternion](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleCurve.quaternion) | Create Sample Curve with operation 'Quaternion'. |
| [vector](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleCurve.vector) | Create Sample Curve with operation 'Vector'. |

##### boolean { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleCurve.boolean }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleCurve.boolean(
    curves=None,
    value=False,
    length=0.0,
    curve_index=0,
)
```

Create Sample Curve with operation 'Boolean'.

##### color { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleCurve.color }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleCurve.color(
    curves=None,
    value=None,
    length=0.0,
    curve_index=0,
)
```

Create Sample Curve with operation 'Color'.

##### float { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleCurve.float }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleCurve.float(
    curves=None,
    value=0.0,
    length=0.0,
    curve_index=0,
)
```

Create Sample Curve with operation 'Float'.

##### integer { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleCurve.integer }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleCurve.integer(
    curves=None,
    value=0,
    length=0.0,
    curve_index=0,
)
```

Create Sample Curve with operation 'Integer'.

##### matrix { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleCurve.matrix }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleCurve.matrix(
    curves=None,
    value=None,
    length=0.0,
    curve_index=0,
)
```

Create Sample Curve with operation '4x4 Matrix'.

##### quaternion { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleCurve.quaternion }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleCurve.quaternion(
    curves=None,
    value=None,
    length=0.0,
    curve_index=0,
)
```

Create Sample Curve with operation 'Quaternion'.

##### vector { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleCurve.vector }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleCurve.vector(
    curves=None,
    value=None,
    length=0.0,
    curve_index=0,
)
```

Create Sample Curve with operation 'Vector'.

### SampleIndex { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex(
    geometry=None,
    value=0.0,
    index=0,
    *,
    data_type='FLOAT',
    domain='POINT',
    clamp=False,
)
```

Retrieve values from specific geometry elements

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [clamp](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex.clamp) |  |
| [data_type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex.data_type) |  |
| [domain](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex.domain) |  |
| [i_geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex.i_geometry) | Input socket: Geometry |
| [i_index](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex.i_index) | Input socket: Index |
| [i_value](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex.i_value) | Input socket: Value |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex.node) |  |
| [o_value](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex.o_value) | Output socket: Value |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex.type) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [boolean](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex.boolean) | Create Sample Index with operation 'Boolean'. |
| [color](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex.color) | Create Sample Index with operation 'Color'. |
| [edge](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex.edge) | Create Sample Index with operation 'Edge'. |
| [face](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex.face) | Create Sample Index with operation 'Face'. |
| [face_corner](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex.face_corner) | Create Sample Index with operation 'Face Corner'. |
| [float](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex.float) | Create Sample Index with operation 'Float'. |
| [instance](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex.instance) | Create Sample Index with operation 'Instance'. |
| [integer](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex.integer) | Create Sample Index with operation 'Integer'. |
| [layer](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex.layer) | Create Sample Index with operation 'Layer'. |
| [matrix](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex.matrix) | Create Sample Index with operation '4x4 Matrix'. |
| [point](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex.point) | Create Sample Index with operation 'Point'. |
| [quaternion](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex.quaternion) | Create Sample Index with operation 'Quaternion'. |
| [spline](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex.spline) | Create Sample Index with operation 'Spline'. |
| [vector](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex.vector) | Create Sample Index with operation 'Vector'. |

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex.boolean(geometry=None, value=False, index=0)
```

Create Sample Index with operation 'Boolean'.

##### color { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex.color }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleIndex.color(geometry=None, value=None, index=0)
```

```python

```

```python

```

```python
    geometry=None,
    value=None,
    index=0,
)
```



```python
)

```


### SampleNearest { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearest }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearest(
    geometry=None,
    sample_position=None,
    *,
    domain='POINT',
)
```

Find the element of a geometry closest to a position. Similar to the "Index of Nearest" node

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [domain](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearest.domain) |  |
| [i_geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearest.i_geometry) | Input socket: Geometry |
| [i_sample_position](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearest.i_sample_position) | Input socket: Sample Position |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearest.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearest.node) |  |
| [o_index](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearest.o_index) | Output socket: Index |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearest.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearest.type) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [edge](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearest.edge) | Create Sample Nearest with operation 'Edge'. |
| [face](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearest.face) | Create Sample Nearest with operation 'Face'. |
| [face_corner](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearest.face_corner) | Create Sample Nearest with operation 'Face Corner'. |
| [point](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearest.point) | Create Sample Nearest with operation 'Point'. |

##### edge { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearest.edge }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearest.edge(geometry=None, sample_position=None)
```

Create Sample Nearest with operation 'Edge'.

##### face { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearest.face }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearest.face(geometry=None, sample_position=None)
```

Create Sample Nearest with operation 'Face'.

##### face_corner { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearest.face_corner }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearest.face_corner(
    geometry=None,
    sample_position=None,
)
```

Create Sample Nearest with operation 'Face Corner'.

##### point { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearest.point }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearest.point(geometry=None, sample_position=None)
```

Create Sample Nearest with operation 'Point'.

### SampleNearestSurface { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface(
    mesh=None,
    value=0.0,
    group_id=0,
    sample_position=None,
    sample_group_id=0,
    *,
    data_type='FLOAT',
)
```

Calculate the interpolated value of a mesh attribute on the closest point of its surface

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [data_type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.data_type) |  |
| [i_group_id](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.i_group_id) | Input socket: Group ID |
| [i_mesh](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.i_mesh) | Input socket: Mesh |
| [i_sample_group_id](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.i_sample_group_id) | Input socket: Sample Group ID |
| [i_sample_position](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.i_sample_position) | Input socket: Sample Position |
| [i_value](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.i_value) | Input socket: Value |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.node) |  |
| [o_is_valid](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.o_is_valid) | Output socket: Is Valid |
| [o_value](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.o_value) | Output socket: Value |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.type) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [boolean](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.boolean) | Create Sample Nearest Surface with operation 'Boolean'. |
| [color](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.color) | Create Sample Nearest Surface with operation 'Color'. |
| [float](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.float) | Create Sample Nearest Surface with operation 'Float'. |
| [integer](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.integer) | Create Sample Nearest Surface with operation 'Integer'. |
| [matrix](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.matrix) | Create Sample Nearest Surface with operation '4x4 Matrix'. |
| [quaternion](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.quaternion) | Create Sample Nearest Surface with operation 'Quaternion'. |
| [vector](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.vector) | Create Sample Nearest Surface with operation 'Vector'. |

##### boolean { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.boolean }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.boolean(
    mesh=None,
    value=False,
    group_id=0,
    sample_position=None,
    sample_group_id=0,
)
```

Create Sample Nearest Surface with operation 'Boolean'.

##### color { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.color }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.color(
    mesh=None,
    value=None,
    group_id=0,
    sample_position=None,
    sample_group_id=0,
)
```

##### float { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.float }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.float(
    mesh=None,
    value=0.0,
    group_id=0,
    sample_position=None,
    sample_group_id=0,
)
```

##### integer { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.integer }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.integer(
    mesh=None,
    value=0,
    group_id=0,
    sample_position=None,
    sample_group_id=0,
)
```

```python

    mesh=None,
    value=None,
    group_id=0,
    sample_position=None,
    sample_group_id=0,
)
```

##### quaternion { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.quaternion }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.quaternion(
    mesh=None,
    value=None,
    group_id=0,
    sample_position=None,
    sample_group_id=0,
)
```

##### vector { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.vector }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleNearestSurface.vector(
    mesh=None,
    value=None,
    group_id=0,
    sample_position=None,
    sample_group_id=0,
)
```

### SampleUVSurface { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface(
    mesh=None,
    value=0.0,
    source_uv_map=None,
    sample_uv=None,
    *,
    data_type='FLOAT',
)
```

Calculate the interpolated values of a mesh attribute at a UV coordinate

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [data_type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.data_type) |  |
| [i_mesh](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.i_mesh) | Input socket: Mesh |
| [i_sample_uv](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.i_sample_uv) | Input socket: Sample UV |
| [i_source_uv_map](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.i_source_uv_map) | Input socket: UV Map |
| [i_value](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.i_value) | Input socket: Value |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.node) |  |
| [o_is_valid](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.o_is_valid) | Output socket: Is Valid |
| [o_value](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.o_value) | Output socket: Value |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.type) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [boolean](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.boolean) | Create Sample UV Surface with operation 'Boolean'. |
| [color](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.color) | Create Sample UV Surface with operation 'Color'. |
| [float](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.float) | Create Sample UV Surface with operation 'Float'. |
| [integer](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.integer) | Create Sample UV Surface with operation 'Integer'. |
| [matrix](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.matrix) | Create Sample UV Surface with operation '4x4 Matrix'. |
| [quaternion](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.quaternion) | Create Sample UV Surface with operation 'Quaternion'. |
| [vector](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.vector) | Create Sample UV Surface with operation 'Vector'. |

##### boolean { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.boolean }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.boolean(
    mesh=None,
    value=False,
    source_uv_map=None,
    sample_uv=None,
)
```

Create Sample UV Surface with operation 'Boolean'.

##### color { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.color }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.color(
    mesh=None,
    value=None,
    source_uv_map=None,
    sample_uv=None,
)
```

Create Sample UV Surface with operation 'Color'.

##### float { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.float }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.float(
    mesh=None,
    value=0.0,
    source_uv_map=None,
    sample_uv=None,
)
```

Create Sample UV Surface with operation 'Float'.

##### integer { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.integer }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.integer(
    mesh=None,
    value=0,
    source_uv_map=None,
    sample_uv=None,
)
```

Create Sample UV Surface with operation 'Integer'.

##### matrix { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.matrix }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.matrix(
    mesh=None,
    value=None,
    source_uv_map=None,
    sample_uv=None,
)
```

Create Sample UV Surface with operation '4x4 Matrix'.

##### quaternion { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.quaternion }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.quaternion(
    mesh=None,
    value=None,
    source_uv_map=None,
    sample_uv=None,
)
```

Create Sample UV Surface with operation 'Quaternion'.

##### vector { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.vector }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SampleUVSurface.vector(
    mesh=None,
    value=None,
    source_uv_map=None,
    sample_uv=None,
)
```

Create Sample UV Surface with operation 'Vector'.

### ScaleElements { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleElements }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleElements(
    geometry=None,
    selection=True,
    scale=1.0,
    center=None,
    scale_mode='Uniform',
    axis=None,
    *,
    domain='FACE',
)
```

Scale groups of connected edges and faces

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [domain](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleElements.domain) |  |
| [i_axis](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleElements.i_axis) | Input socket: Axis |
| [i_center](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleElements.i_center) | Input socket: Center |
| [i_geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleElements.i_geometry) | Input socket: Geometry |
| [i_scale](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleElements.i_scale) | Input socket: Scale |
| [i_scale_mode](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleElements.i_scale_mode) | Input socket: Scale Mode |
| [i_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleElements.i_selection) | Input socket: Selection |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleElements.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleElements.node) |  |
| [o_geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleElements.o_geometry) | Output socket: Geometry |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleElements.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleElements.type) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [edge](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleElements.edge) | Create Scale Elements with operation 'Edge'. |
| [face](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleElements.face) | Create Scale Elements with operation 'Face'. |

##### edge { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleElements.edge }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleElements.edge(
    geometry=None,
    selection=True,
    scale=1.0,
    center=None,
    scale_mode='Uniform',
)
```

Create Scale Elements with operation 'Edge'.

##### face { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleElements.face }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleElements.face(
    geometry=None,
    selection=True,
    scale=1.0,
    center=None,
    scale_mode='Uniform',
)
```

Create Scale Elements with operation 'Face'.

### ScaleInstances { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleInstances }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleInstances(
    instances=None,
    selection=True,
    scale=None,
    center=None,
    local_space=True,
)
```

Scale geometry instances in local or global space

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_center](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleInstances.i_center) | Input socket: Center |
| [i_instances](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleInstances.i_instances) | Input socket: Instances |
| [i_local_space](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleInstances.i_local_space) | Input socket: Local Space |
| [i_scale](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleInstances.i_scale) | Input socket: Scale |
| [i_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleInstances.i_selection) | Input socket: Selection |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleInstances.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleInstances.node) |  |
| [o_instances](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleInstances.o_instances) | Output socket: Instances |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleInstances.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.ScaleInstances.type) |  |

### SeparateComponents { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateComponents }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateComponents(geometry=None)
```

Split a geometry into a separate output for each type of data in the geometry

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateComponents.i_geometry) | Input socket: Geometry |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateComponents.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateComponents.node) |  |
| [o_curve](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateComponents.o_curve) | Output socket: Curve |
| [o_grease_pencil](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateComponents.o_grease_pencil) | Output socket: Grease Pencil |
| [o_instances](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateComponents.o_instances) | Output socket: Instances |
| [o_mesh](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateComponents.o_mesh) | Output socket: Mesh |
| [o_point_cloud](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateComponents.o_point_cloud) | Output socket: Point Cloud |
| [o_volume](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateComponents.o_volume) | Output socket: Volume |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateComponents.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateComponents.type) |  |

### SeparateGeometry { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateGeometry }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateGeometry(
    geometry=None,
    selection=True,
    *,
    domain='POINT',
)
```

Split a geometry into two geometry outputs based on a selection

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [domain](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateGeometry.domain) |  |
| [i_geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateGeometry.i_geometry) | Input socket: Geometry |
| [i_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateGeometry.i_selection) | Input socket: Selection |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateGeometry.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateGeometry.node) |  |
| [o_inverted](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateGeometry.o_inverted) | Output socket: Inverted |
| [o_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateGeometry.o_selection) | Output socket: Selection |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateGeometry.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateGeometry.type) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [edge](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateGeometry.edge) | Create Separate Geometry with operation 'Edge'. |
| [face](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateGeometry.face) | Create Separate Geometry with operation 'Face'. |
| [instance](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateGeometry.instance) | Create Separate Geometry with operation 'Instance'. |
| [layer](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateGeometry.layer) | Create Separate Geometry with operation 'Layer'. |
| [point](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateGeometry.point) | Create Separate Geometry with operation 'Point'. |
| [spline](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateGeometry.spline) | Create Separate Geometry with operation 'Spline'. |

##### edge { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateGeometry.edge }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateGeometry.edge(geometry=None, selection=True)
```

Create Separate Geometry with operation 'Edge'.

##### face { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateGeometry.face }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateGeometry.face(geometry=None, selection=True)
```

Create Separate Geometry with operation 'Face'.

##### instance { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateGeometry.instance }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateGeometry.instance(geometry=None, selection=True)
```

Create Separate Geometry with operation 'Instance'.

##### layer { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateGeometry.layer }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateGeometry.layer(geometry=None, selection=True)
```

Create Separate Geometry with operation 'Layer'.

##### point { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateGeometry.point }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateGeometry.point(geometry=None, selection=True)
```

Create Separate Geometry with operation 'Point'.

##### spline { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateGeometry.spline }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SeparateGeometry.spline(geometry=None, selection=True)
```

Create Separate Geometry with operation 'Spline'.

### SetCurveNormal { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveNormal }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveNormal(
    curve=None,
    selection=True,
    mode='Minimum Twist',
    normal=None,
)
```

Set the evaluation mode for curve normals

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_curve](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveNormal.i_curve) | Input socket: Curve |
| [i_mode](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveNormal.i_mode) | Input socket: Mode |
| [i_normal](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveNormal.i_normal) | Input socket: Normal |
| [i_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveNormal.i_selection) | Input socket: Selection |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveNormal.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveNormal.node) |  |
| [o_curve](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveNormal.o_curve) | Output socket: Curve |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveNormal.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveNormal.type) |  |

### SetCurveRadius { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveRadius }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveRadius(curve=None, selection=True, radius=0.005)
```

Set the radius of the curve at each control point

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_curve](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveRadius.i_curve) | Input socket: Curve |
| [i_radius](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveRadius.i_radius) | Input socket: Radius |
| [i_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveRadius.i_selection) | Input socket: Selection |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveRadius.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveRadius.node) |  |
| [o_curve](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveRadius.o_curve) | Output socket: Curve |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveRadius.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveRadius.type) |  |

### SetCurveTilt { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveTilt }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveTilt(curve=None, selection=True, tilt=0.0)
```

Set the tilt angle at each curve control point

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_curve](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveTilt.i_curve) | Input socket: Curve |
| [i_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveTilt.i_selection) | Input socket: Selection |
| [i_tilt](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveTilt.i_tilt) | Input socket: Tilt |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveTilt.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveTilt.node) |  |
| [o_curve](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveTilt.o_curve) | Output socket: Curve |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveTilt.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetCurveTilt.type) |  |

### SetFaceSet { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetFaceSet }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetFaceSet(mesh=None, selection=True, face_set=0)
```

Set sculpt face set values for faces

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_face_set](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetFaceSet.i_face_set) | Input socket: Face Set |
| [i_mesh](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetFaceSet.i_mesh) | Input socket: Mesh |
| [i_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetFaceSet.i_selection) | Input socket: Selection |

| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetFaceSet.node) |  |
| [o_mesh](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetFaceSet.o_mesh) | Output socket: Mesh |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetFaceSet.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetFaceSet.type) |  |

### SetGeometryName { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGeometryName }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGeometryName(geometry=None, name='')
```

Set the name of a geometry for easier debugging

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGeometryName.i_geometry) | Input socket: Geometry |
| [i_name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGeometryName.i_name) | Input socket: Name |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGeometryName.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGeometryName.node) |  |
| [o_geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGeometryName.o_geometry) | Output socket: Geometry |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGeometryName.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGeometryName.type) |  |

### SetGreasePencilColor { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilColor }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilColor(
    grease_pencil=None,
    selection=True,
    color=None,
    opacity=1.0,
    *,
    mode='STROKE',
)
```

Set color and opacity attributes on Grease Pencil geometry

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_color](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilColor.i_color) | Input socket: Color |
| [i_grease_pencil](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilColor.i_grease_pencil) | Input socket: Grease Pencil |
| [i_opacity](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilColor.i_opacity) | Input socket: Opacity |
| [i_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilColor.i_selection) | Input socket: Selection |
| [mode](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilColor.mode) |  |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilColor.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilColor.node) |  |
| [o_grease_pencil](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilColor.o_grease_pencil) | Output socket: Grease Pencil |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilColor.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilColor.type) |  |

### SetGreasePencilDepth { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilDepth }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilDepth(
    grease_pencil=None,
    *,
    depth_order='2D',
)
```

Set the Grease Pencil depth order to use

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [depth_order](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilDepth.depth_order) |  |
| [i_grease_pencil](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilDepth.i_grease_pencil) | Input socket: Grease Pencil |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilDepth.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilDepth.node) |  |
| [o_grease_pencil](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilDepth.o_grease_pencil) | Output socket: Grease Pencil |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilDepth.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilDepth.type) |  |

### SetGreasePencilSoftness { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilSoftness }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilSoftness(
    grease_pencil=None,
    selection=True,
    softness=0.0,
)
```

Set softness attribute on Grease Pencil geometry

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_grease_pencil](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilSoftness.i_grease_pencil) | Input socket: Grease Pencil |
| [i_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilSoftness.i_selection) | Input socket: Selection |
| [i_softness](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilSoftness.i_softness) | Input socket: Softness |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilSoftness.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilSoftness.node) |  |
| [o_grease_pencil](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilSoftness.o_grease_pencil) | Output socket: Grease Pencil |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilSoftness.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetGreasePencilSoftness.type) |  |

### SetHandlePositions { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetHandlePositions }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetHandlePositions(
    curve=None,
    selection=True,
    position=None,
    offset=None,
    *,
    mode='LEFT',
)
```

Set the positions for the handles of Bézier curves

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_curve](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetHandlePositions.i_curve) | Input socket: Curve |
| [i_offset](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetHandlePositions.i_offset) | Input socket: Offset |
| [i_position](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetHandlePositions.i_position) | Input socket: Position |
| [i_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetHandlePositions.i_selection) | Input socket: Selection |
| [mode](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetHandlePositions.mode) |  |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetHandlePositions.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetHandlePositions.node) |  |
| [o_curve](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetHandlePositions.o_curve) | Output socket: Curve |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetHandlePositions.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetHandlePositions.type) |  |

### SetID { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetID }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetID(geometry=None, selection=True, id=0)
```

Set the id attribute on the input geometry, mainly used internally for randomizing

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetID.i_geometry) | Input socket: Geometry |
| [i_id](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetID.i_id) | Input socket: ID |
| [i_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetID.i_selection) | Input socket: Selection |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetID.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetID.node) |  |
| [o_geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetID.o_geometry) | Output socket: Geometry |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetID.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetID.type) |  |

### SetInstanceTransform { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetInstanceTransform }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetInstanceTransform(
    instances=None,
    selection=True,
    transform=None,
)
```

Set the transformation matrix of every instance

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_instances](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetInstanceTransform.i_instances) | Input socket: Instances |
| [i_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetInstanceTransform.i_selection) | Input socket: Selection |
| [i_transform](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetInstanceTransform.i_transform) | Input socket: Transform |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetInstanceTransform.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetInstanceTransform.node) |  |
| [o_instances](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetInstanceTransform.o_instances) | Output socket: Instances |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetInstanceTransform.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetInstanceTransform.type) |  |

### SetMaterial { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMaterial }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMaterial(
    geometry=None,
    selection=True,
    material=None,
)
```

Assign a material to geometry elements

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMaterial.i_geometry) | Input socket: Geometry |
| [i_material](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMaterial.i_material) | Input socket: Material |
| [i_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMaterial.i_selection) | Input socket: Selection |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMaterial.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMaterial.node) |  |
| [o_geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMaterial.o_geometry) | Output socket: Geometry |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMaterial.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMaterial.type) |  |

### SetMaterialIndex { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMaterialIndex }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMaterialIndex(
    geometry=None,
    selection=True,
    material_index=0,
)
```

Set the material index for each selected geometry element

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMaterialIndex.i_geometry) | Input socket: Geometry |
| [i_material_index](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMaterialIndex.i_material_index) | Input socket: Material Index |
| [i_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMaterialIndex.i_selection) | Input socket: Selection |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMaterialIndex.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMaterialIndex.node) |  |
| [o_geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMaterialIndex.o_geometry) | Output socket: Geometry |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMaterialIndex.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMaterialIndex.type) |  |

### SetMeshNormal { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMeshNormal }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMeshNormal(
    mesh=None,
    remove_custom=True,
    edge_sharpness=False,
    face_sharpness=False,
    *,
    mode='SHARPNESS',
    domain='POINT',
)
```

Store a normal vector for each mesh element

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [domain](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMeshNormal.domain) |  |
| [i_edge_sharpness](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMeshNormal.i_edge_sharpness) | Input socket: Edge Sharpness |
| [i_face_sharpness](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMeshNormal.i_face_sharpness) | Input socket: Face Sharpness |
| [i_mesh](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMeshNormal.i_mesh) | Input socket: Mesh |
| [i_remove_custom](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMeshNormal.i_remove_custom) | Input socket: Remove Custom |
| [mode](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMeshNormal.mode) |  |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMeshNormal.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMeshNormal.node) |  |
| [o_mesh](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMeshNormal.o_mesh) | Output socket: Mesh |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMeshNormal.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMeshNormal.type) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [face](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMeshNormal.face) | Create Set Mesh Normal with operation 'Face'. |
| [face_corner](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMeshNormal.face_corner) | Create Set Mesh Normal with operation 'Face Corner'. |
| [point](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMeshNormal.point) | Create Set Mesh Normal with operation 'Point'. |

##### face { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMeshNormal.face }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMeshNormal.face(mesh=None, custom_normal=None)
```

Create Set Mesh Normal with operation 'Face'.

##### face_corner { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMeshNormal.face_corner }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMeshNormal.face_corner(mesh=None, custom_normal=None)
```

Create Set Mesh Normal with operation 'Face Corner'.

##### point { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMeshNormal.point }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetMeshNormal.point(mesh=None, custom_normal=None)
```

Create Set Mesh Normal with operation 'Point'.

### SetPointRadius { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetPointRadius }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetPointRadius(points=None, selection=True, radius=0.05)
```

Set the display size of point cloud points

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_points](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetPointRadius.i_points) | Input socket: Points |
| [i_radius](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetPointRadius.i_radius) | Input socket: Radius |
| [i_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetPointRadius.i_selection) | Input socket: Selection |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetPointRadius.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetPointRadius.node) |  |
| [o_points](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetPointRadius.o_points) | Output socket: Points |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetPointRadius.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetPointRadius.type) |  |

### SetPosition { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetPosition }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetPosition(
    geometry=None,
    selection=True,
    position=None,
    offset=None,
)
```

Set the location of each point

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetPosition.i_geometry) | Input socket: Geometry |
| [i_offset](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetPosition.i_offset) | Input socket: Offset |
| [i_position](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetPosition.i_position) | Input socket: Position |
| [i_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetPosition.i_selection) | Input socket: Selection |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetPosition.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetPosition.node) |  |
| [o_geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetPosition.o_geometry) | Output socket: Geometry |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetPosition.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetPosition.type) |  |

### SetSelection { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSelection }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSelection(
    geometry=None,
    selection=True,
    *,
    domain='POINT',
    selection_type='BOOLEAN',
)
```

Set selection of the edited geometry, for tool execution

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [domain](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSelection.domain) |  |
| [i_geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSelection.i_geometry) | Input socket: Geometry |
| [i_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSelection.i_selection) | Input socket: Selection |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSelection.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSelection.node) |  |
| [o_geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSelection.o_geometry) | Output socket: Geometry |
| [selection_type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSelection.selection_type) |  |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSelection.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSelection.type) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [edge](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSelection.edge) | Create Set Selection with operation 'Edge'. |
| [face](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSelection.face) | Create Set Selection with operation 'Face'. |
| [point](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSelection.point) | Create Set Selection with operation 'Point'. |
| [spline](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSelection.spline) | Create Set Selection with operation 'Spline'. |

##### edge { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSelection.edge }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSelection.edge(geometry=None, selection=True)
```

Create Set Selection with operation 'Edge'.

##### face { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSelection.face }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSelection.face(geometry=None, selection=True)
```

Create Set Selection with operation 'Face'.

##### point { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSelection.point }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSelection.point(geometry=None, selection=True)
```

Create Set Selection with operation 'Point'.

##### spline { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSelection.spline }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSelection.spline(geometry=None, selection=True)
```

Create Set Selection with operation 'Spline'.

### SetShadeSmooth { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetShadeSmooth }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetShadeSmooth(
    geometry=None,
    selection=True,
    shade_smooth=True,
    *,
    domain='FACE',
)
```

Control the smoothness of mesh normals around each face by changing the "shade smooth" attribute

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [domain](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetShadeSmooth.domain) |  |
| [i_geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetShadeSmooth.i_geometry) | Input socket: Mesh |
| [i_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetShadeSmooth.i_selection) | Input socket: Selection |
| [i_shade_smooth](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetShadeSmooth.i_shade_smooth) | Input socket: Shade Smooth |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetShadeSmooth.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetShadeSmooth.node) |  |
| [o_geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetShadeSmooth.o_geometry) | Output socket: Mesh |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetShadeSmooth.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetShadeSmooth.type) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [edge](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetShadeSmooth.edge) | Create Set Shade Smooth with operation 'Edge'. |
| [face](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetShadeSmooth.face) | Create Set Shade Smooth with operation 'Face'. |

##### edge { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetShadeSmooth.edge }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetShadeSmooth.edge(
    geometry=None,
    selection=True,
    shade_smooth=True,
)
```

Create Set Shade Smooth with operation 'Edge'.

##### face { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetShadeSmooth.face }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetShadeSmooth.face(
    geometry=None,
    selection=True,
    shade_smooth=True,
)
```

Create Set Shade Smooth with operation 'Face'.

### SetSplineCyclic { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineCyclic }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineCyclic(
    geometry=None,
    selection=True,
    cyclic=False,
)
```

Control whether each spline loops back on itself by changing the "cyclic" attribute

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_cyclic](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineCyclic.i_cyclic) | Input socket: Cyclic |
| [i_geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineCyclic.i_geometry) | Input socket: Curve |
| [i_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineCyclic.i_selection) | Input socket: Selection |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineCyclic.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineCyclic.node) |  |
| [o_geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineCyclic.o_geometry) | Output socket: Curve |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineCyclic.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineCyclic.type) |  |

### SetSplineResolution { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineResolution }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineResolution(
    geometry=None,
    selection=True,
    resolution=12,
)
```

Control how many evaluated points should be generated on every curve segment

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineResolution.i_geometry) | Input socket: Curve |
| [i_resolution](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineResolution.i_resolution) | Input socket: Resolution |
| [i_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineResolution.i_selection) | Input socket: Selection |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineResolution.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineResolution.node) |  |
| [o_geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineResolution.o_geometry) | Output socket: Curve |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineResolution.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineResolution.type) |  |

### SetSplineType { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineType }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineType(
    curve=None,
    selection=True,
    *,
    spline_type='POLY',
)
```

Change the type of curves

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_curve](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineType.i_curve) | Input socket: Curve |
| [i_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineType.i_selection) | Input socket: Selection |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineType.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineType.node) |  |
| [o_curve](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineType.o_curve) | Output socket: Curve |
| [spline_type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineType.spline_type) |  |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineType.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SetSplineType.type) |  |

### SortElements { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SortElements }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SortElements(
    geometry=None,
    selection=True,
    group_id=0,
    sort_weight=0.0,
    *,
    domain='POINT',
)
```

Rearrange geometry elements, changing their indices

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [domain](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SortElements.domain) |  |
| [i_geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SortElements.i_geometry) | Input socket: Geometry |
| [i_group_id](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SortElements.i_group_id) | Input socket: Group ID |
| [i_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SortElements.i_selection) | Input socket: Selection |
| [i_sort_weight](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SortElements.i_sort_weight) | Input socket: Sort Weight |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SortElements.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SortElements.node) |  |
| [o_geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SortElements.o_geometry) | Output socket: Geometry |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SortElements.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SortElements.type) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [edge](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SortElements.edge) | Create Sort Elements with operation 'Edge'. |
| [face](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SortElements.face) | Create Sort Elements with operation 'Face'. |
| [instance](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SortElements.instance) | Create Sort Elements with operation 'Instance'. |
| [point](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SortElements.point) | Create Sort Elements with operation 'Point'. |
| [spline](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SortElements.spline) | Create Sort Elements with operation 'Spline'. |

##### edge { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SortElements.edge }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SortElements.edge(
    geometry=None,
    selection=True,
    group_id=0,
    sort_weight=0.0,
)
```

Create Sort Elements with operation 'Edge'.

##### face { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SortElements.face }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SortElements.face(
    geometry=None,
    selection=True,
    group_id=0,
    sort_weight=0.0,
)
```

Create Sort Elements with operation 'Face'.

##### instance { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SortElements.instance }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SortElements.instance(
    geometry=None,
    selection=True,
    group_id=0,
    sort_weight=0.0,
)
```

Create Sort Elements with operation 'Instance'.

##### point { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SortElements.point }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SortElements.point(
    geometry=None,
    selection=True,
    group_id=0,
    sort_weight=0.0,
)
```

Create Sort Elements with operation 'Point'.

##### spline { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SortElements.spline }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SortElements.spline(
    geometry=None,
    selection=True,
    group_id=0,
    sort_weight=0.0,
)
```

Create Sort Elements with operation 'Spline'.

### Spiral { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Spiral }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.Spiral(
    resolution=32,
    rotations=2.0,
    start_radius=1.0,
    end_radius=2.0,
    height=2.0,
    reverse=False,
)
```

Generate a poly spline in a spiral shape

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_end_radius](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Spiral.i_end_radius) | Input socket: End Radius |
| [i_height](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Spiral.i_height) | Input socket: Height |
| [i_resolution](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Spiral.i_resolution) | Input socket: Resolution |
| [i_reverse](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Spiral.i_reverse) | Input socket: Reverse |
| [i_rotations](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Spiral.i_rotations) | Input socket: Rotations |
| [i_start_radius](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Spiral.i_start_radius) | Input socket: Start Radius |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Spiral.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Spiral.node) |  |
| [o_curve](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Spiral.o_curve) | Output socket: Curve |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Spiral.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Spiral.type) |  |

### SplitEdges { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitEdges }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitEdges(mesh=None, selection=True)
```

Duplicate mesh edges and break connections with the surrounding faces

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_mesh](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitEdges.i_mesh) | Input socket: Mesh |
| [i_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitEdges.i_selection) | Input socket: Selection |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitEdges.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitEdges.node) |  |
| [o_mesh](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitEdges.o_mesh) | Output socket: Mesh |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitEdges.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitEdges.type) |  |

### SplitToInstances { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances(
    geometry=None,
    selection=True,
    group_id=0,
    *,
    domain='POINT',
)
```

Create separate geometries containing the elements from the same group

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [domain](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances.domain) |  |
| [i_geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances.i_geometry) | Input socket: Geometry |
| [i_group_id](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances.i_group_id) | Input socket: Group ID |
| [i_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances.i_selection) | Input socket: Selection |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances.node) |  |
| [o_group_id](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances.o_group_id) | Output socket: Group ID |
| [o_instances](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances.o_instances) | Output socket: Instances |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances.type) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [edge](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances.edge) | Create Split to Instances with operation 'Edge'. |
| [face](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances.face) | Create Split to Instances with operation 'Face'. |
| [instance](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances.instance) | Create Split to Instances with operation 'Instance'. |
| [layer](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances.layer) | Create Split to Instances with operation 'Layer'. |
| [point](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances.point) | Create Split to Instances with operation 'Point'. |
| [spline](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances.spline) | Create Split to Instances with operation 'Spline'. |

##### edge { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances.edge }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances.edge(
    geometry=None,
    selection=True,
    group_id=0,
)
```

Create Split to Instances with operation 'Edge'.

##### face { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances.face }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances.face(
    geometry=None,
    selection=True,
    group_id=0,
)
```

Create Split to Instances with operation 'Face'.

##### instance { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances.instance }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances.instance(
    geometry=None,
    selection=True,
    group_id=0,
)
```

Create Split to Instances with operation 'Instance'.

##### layer { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances.layer }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances.layer(
    geometry=None,
    selection=True,
    group_id=0,
)
```

Create Split to Instances with operation 'Layer'.

##### point { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances.point }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances.point(
    geometry=None,
    selection=True,
    group_id=0,
)
```

Create Split to Instances with operation 'Point'.

##### spline { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances.spline }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SplitToInstances.spline(
    geometry=None,
    selection=True,
    group_id=0,
)
```

Create Split to Instances with operation 'Spline'.

### Star { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Star }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.Star(
    points=8,
    inner_radius=1.0,
    outer_radius=2.0,
    twist=0.0,
)
```

Generate a poly spline in a star pattern by connecting alternating points of two circles

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_inner_radius](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Star.i_inner_radius) | Input socket: Inner Radius |
| [i_outer_radius](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Star.i_outer_radius) | Input socket: Outer Radius |
| [i_points](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Star.i_points) | Input socket: Points |
| [i_twist](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Star.i_twist) | Input socket: Twist |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Star.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Star.node) |  |
| [o_curve](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Star.o_curve) | Output socket: Curve |
| [o_outer_points](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Star.o_outer_points) | Output socket: Outer Points |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Star.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Star.type) |  |

### StringToCurves { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.StringToCurves }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.StringToCurves(
    string='',
    size=1.0,
    character_spacing=1.0,
    word_spacing=1.0,
    line_spacing=1.0,
    text_box_width=0.0,
    text_box_height=0.0,
    *,
    overflow='OVERFLOW',
    align_x='LEFT',
    align_y='TOP_BASELINE',
    pivot_mode='BOTTOM_LEFT',
)
```

Generate a paragraph of text with a specific font, using a curve instance to store each character

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [align_x](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.StringToCurves.align_x) |  |
| [align_y](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.StringToCurves.align_y) |  |
| [i_character_spacing](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.StringToCurves.i_character_spacing) | Input socket: Character Spacing |
| [i_line_spacing](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.StringToCurves.i_line_spacing) | Input socket: Line Spacing |
| [i_size](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.StringToCurves.i_size) | Input socket: Size |
| [i_string](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.StringToCurves.i_string) | Input socket: String |
| [i_text_box_height](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.StringToCurves.i_text_box_height) | Input socket: Text Box Height |
| [i_text_box_width](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.StringToCurves.i_text_box_width) | Input socket: Text Box Width |
| [i_word_spacing](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.StringToCurves.i_word_spacing) | Input socket: Word Spacing |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.StringToCurves.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.StringToCurves.node) |  |
| [o_curve_instances](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.StringToCurves.o_curve_instances) | Output socket: Curve Instances |
| [o_line](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.StringToCurves.o_line) | Output socket: Line |
| [o_pivot_point](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.StringToCurves.o_pivot_point) | Output socket: Pivot Point |
| [o_remainder](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.StringToCurves.o_remainder) | Output socket: Remainder |
| [overflow](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.StringToCurves.overflow) |  |
| [pivot_mode](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.StringToCurves.pivot_mode) |  |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.StringToCurves.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.StringToCurves.type) |  |

### SubdivideCurve { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivideCurve }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivideCurve(curve=None, cuts=1)
```

Dividing each curve segment into a specified number of pieces

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_curve](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivideCurve.i_curve) | Input socket: Curve |
| [i_cuts](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivideCurve.i_cuts) | Input socket: Cuts |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivideCurve.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivideCurve.node) |  |
| [o_curve](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivideCurve.o_curve) | Output socket: Curve |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivideCurve.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivideCurve.type) |  |

### SubdivideMesh { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivideMesh }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivideMesh(mesh=None, level=1)
```

Divide mesh faces into smaller ones without changing the shape or volume, using linear interpolation to place the new vertices

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_level](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivideMesh.i_level) | Input socket: Level |
| [i_mesh](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivideMesh.i_mesh) | Input socket: Mesh |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivideMesh.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivideMesh.node) |  |
| [o_mesh](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivideMesh.o_mesh) | Output socket: Mesh |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivideMesh.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivideMesh.type) |  |

### SubdivisionSurface { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivisionSurface }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivisionSurface(
    mesh=None,
    level=1,
    edge_crease=0.0,
    vertex_crease=0.0,
    limit_surface=True,
    uv_smooth='Keep Boundaries',
    boundary_smooth='All',
)
```

Divide mesh faces to form a smooth surface, using the Catmull-Clark subdivision method

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_boundary_smooth](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivisionSurface.i_boundary_smooth) | Input socket: Boundary Smooth |
| [i_edge_crease](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivisionSurface.i_edge_crease) | Input socket: Edge Crease |
| [i_level](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivisionSurface.i_level) | Input socket: Level |
| [i_limit_surface](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivisionSurface.i_limit_surface) | Input socket: Limit Surface |
| [i_mesh](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivisionSurface.i_mesh) | Input socket: Mesh |
| [i_uv_smooth](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivisionSurface.i_uv_smooth) | Input socket: UV Smooth |
| [i_vertex_crease](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivisionSurface.i_vertex_crease) | Input socket: Vertex Crease |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivisionSurface.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivisionSurface.node) |  |
| [o_mesh](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivisionSurface.o_mesh) | Output socket: Mesh |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivisionSurface.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.SubdivisionSurface.type) |  |

### TransformGeometry { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TransformGeometry }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.TransformGeometry(
    geometry=None,
    mode='Components',
    translation=None,
    rotation=None,
    scale=None,
    transform=None,
)
```

Translate, rotate or scale the geometry

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TransformGeometry.i_geometry) | Input socket: Geometry |
| [i_mode](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TransformGeometry.i_mode) | Input socket: Mode |
| [i_rotation](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TransformGeometry.i_rotation) | Input socket: Rotation |
| [i_scale](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TransformGeometry.i_scale) | Input socket: Scale |
| [i_transform](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TransformGeometry.i_transform) | Input socket: Transform |
| [i_translation](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TransformGeometry.i_translation) | Input socket: Translation |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TransformGeometry.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TransformGeometry.node) |  |
| [o_geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TransformGeometry.o_geometry) | Output socket: Geometry |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TransformGeometry.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TransformGeometry.type) |  |

### TranslateInstances { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TranslateInstances }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.TranslateInstances(
    instances=None,
    selection=True,
    translation=None,
    local_space=True,
)
```

Move top-level geometry instances in local or global space

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_instances](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TranslateInstances.i_instances) | Input socket: Instances |
| [i_local_space](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TranslateInstances.i_local_space) | Input socket: Local Space |
| [i_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TranslateInstances.i_selection) | Input socket: Selection |
| [i_translation](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TranslateInstances.i_translation) | Input socket: Translation |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TranslateInstances.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TranslateInstances.node) |  |
| [o_instances](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TranslateInstances.o_instances) | Output socket: Instances |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TranslateInstances.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TranslateInstances.type) |  |

### Triangulate { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Triangulate }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.Triangulate(
    mesh=None,
    selection=True,
    quad_method='Shortest Diagonal',
    n_gon_method='Beauty',
)
```

Convert all faces in a mesh to triangular faces

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_mesh](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Triangulate.i_mesh) | Input socket: Mesh |
| [i_n_gon_method](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Triangulate.i_n_gon_method) | Input socket: N-gon Method |
| [i_quad_method](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Triangulate.i_quad_method) | Input socket: Quad Method |
| [i_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Triangulate.i_selection) | Input socket: Selection |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Triangulate.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Triangulate.node) |  |
| [o_mesh](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Triangulate.o_mesh) | Output socket: Mesh |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Triangulate.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.Triangulate.type) |  |

### TrimCurve { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TrimCurve }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.TrimCurve(
    curve=None,
    selection=True,
    start=0.0,
    end=1.0,
    start_001=0.0,
    end_001=1.0,
    *,
    mode='FACTOR',
)
```

Shorten curves by removing portions at the start or end

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_curve](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TrimCurve.i_curve) | Input socket: Curve |
| [i_end](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TrimCurve.i_end) | Input socket: End |
| [i_end_001](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TrimCurve.i_end_001) | Input socket: End |
| [i_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TrimCurve.i_selection) | Input socket: Selection |
| [i_start](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TrimCurve.i_start) | Input socket: Start |
| [i_start_001](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TrimCurve.i_start_001) | Input socket: Start |
| [mode](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TrimCurve.mode) |  |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TrimCurve.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TrimCurve.node) |  |
| [o_curve](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TrimCurve.o_curve) | Output socket: Curve |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TrimCurve.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.TrimCurve.type) |  |

### UVSphere { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.UVSphere }

```python
nodes.geometry.geometry.UVSphere(segments=32, rings=16, radius=1.0)
```

Generate a spherical mesh with quads, except for triangles at the top and bottom

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_radius](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.UVSphere.i_radius) | Input socket: Radius |
| [i_rings](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.UVSphere.i_rings) | Input socket: Rings |
| [i_segments](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.UVSphere.i_segments) | Input socket: Segments |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.UVSphere.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.UVSphere.node) |  |
| [o_mesh](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.UVSphere.o_mesh) | Output socket: Mesh |
| [o_uv_map](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.UVSphere.o_uv_map) | Output socket: UV Map |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.UVSphere.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.geometry.UVSphere.type) |  |
